title: Street Show.
content:
Puff, puff, puff. How the trumpets blow
    All you little boys and girls come and see the show.
    One--two--three, the Cat runs up the tree;
    But the little Bird he flies away--
    "She hasn't got me!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Kate Greenaway delivers a powerful performance in "Street Show."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
